info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing ecommerce operations including product listings, orders, and customer data.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management such as listing, adding, updating, and deleting products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints to place, track, and manage customer orders.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided user details.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid user input

example.message: The user registration data is invalid or missing required fields.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Submits a new order on behalf of the specified user.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid order details

example.message: The order data provided is invalid or incomplete.
Payment for the order was declined.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetches the details of an order by its unique identifier.

example.message: The order with the specified ID does not exist.
The format of the order ID provided is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to user's cart
post.description: Adds the specified item to the cart of the given user.

requestBody.description: Details of the cart item to add

example.message: The cart item data is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Quantity must be greater than zero

example.message: The specified user does not exist.

details.issue: User does not exist in the system

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetches the current cart contents for the specified user.

example.message: The specified user does not exist.

details.issue: User does not exist in the system

example.message: The format of the user ID provided is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Get tracking information for a specific order
get.description: Retrieves the latest tracking details for the order identified by orderId, including current status and estimated delivery time.

example.message: The order with the specified ID was not found.

details.issue: No order matches the provided ID

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry with the provided details including name, description, price, and availability.

requestBody.description: Product information to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High-quality noise-cancelling headphones with 20 hours battery life

example.message: The product details contain invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same name already exists in the catalog.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Processes asynchronous payment notifications sent by the payment gateway to update payment status in the system.

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment transaction with the given payment details including amount, currency, and payment method.

requestBody.description: Details required to initiate a payment

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment processor.
The payment request contains invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: Amount must be greater than zero

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Transaction ID provided by the payment processor.

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code used for the order transaction.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status for the order.

status.description: Overall status of the order (e.g., processing, shipped).

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was last updated.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was created.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

userType.description: Type or role of the user (e.g., customer, admin).

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user was last updated.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI and long battery life.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

finalPrice.description: Price after discount for the total quantity

quantity.description: Number of units added to the cart

finalPrice.description: Total price after discount for the quantity

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking info was last updated

orderId.description: Identifier of the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling delivery

trackingId.description: Tracking number assigned by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Aggregate discount applied on the cart

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of items added in the cart

updatedAt.description: Last updated timestamp of the cart

amount.description: Total amount to be paid in the transaction

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the associated order

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment, e.g. credit card, PayPal

paymentGateway.description: Payment gateway or processor used for the transaction

country.description: Country where the user is located

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

userType.description: Type of user, e.g. admin, customer

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order related to this payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

transactionId.description: ID provided by the payment processor for the transaction

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of units available in inventory

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated

error.description: Short description of the error type

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

path.description: Request path that caused the error

field.description: Name of the field with the issue

error.description: Short description of the server error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code for the server error
